heading: Encryption checklist
items: **HTTPS everywhere.** Use TLS for all connections. Hosting platforms (Vercel, Railway, Render) provide free TLS certificates. Never serve your API over plain HTTP.
**Hash passwords with bcrypt or Argon2.** Never store plain-text passwords. Use a work factor of at least 12 rounds for bcrypt.
**Encrypt sensitive columns.** PII like social security numbers or medical records should be encrypted at the application level before storing in the database.
**Database connection encryption.** Use SSL/TLS for database connections, especially when the database is on a different server. Most cloud databases require this by default.
**Encrypt backups.** Database backups contain all your data. Encrypt them with AES-256 and store encryption keys separately from the backups.
